input: multi-relational user graph, item graph, and user-item interaction graph
output: user and item embeddings for downstream recommendation
backbone: Reinforced Attentive Multi-relational Graph Neural Network (RAM-GNN)
loss: not specified (pre-training objective not explicitly stated)
key_idea: pre-train user/item embeddings on separate multi-relational attribute graphs using relation-level attention and reinforced neighbor sampling, then fine-tune on interaction graph
